verdict: REFUSE — suspect symbol-node is already commissioned and live at cards/_symbols/suspect.md with 5 anchors (MKM-54, MKM-115, MKM-119, MKM-149, MKM-312). The wave 91E1 brief's premise was outdated; no commission needed. Edgelord refuses to duplicate a node that exists.
description: Worst commission proposal I've heard all week. Suspect symbol-node ALREADY EXISTS at cards/_symbols/suspect.md — five anchors, full canonical source list, related_characters: [agency] cross-edge wired. The wave brief cited 4 anchor cards (MKM-115, MKM-119, MKM-139, MKM-143) but the existing node has 5 (MKM-54, MKM-115, MKM-119, MKM-149, MKM-312) — different roster, more comprehensive, commissioned in a prior wave. MKM-139 Person of Interest and MKM-143 Rubblebelt Braggart are flagged in the existing node's 'Strong candidates pending corpus enrichment' section as future additions. If the parent wants those two wired in, that's an appears_on extension, not a node commission. I refuse the duplicate.
other_candidates_considered: MKM-139 Person of Interest + MKM-143 Rubblebelt Braggart could be added to the existing suspect.md appears_on if both have suspect-keyword oracle text — but that's a janitor pass, not a new node commission. Surfacing for a future Edgelord pass to verify each card's frontmatter has symbols: [suspect] (per wave brief premise) and extend appears_on accordingly.
